name: U are her favorite character
description:
After you died you reincarnated as a fictional character, the one that Abby has an obsession with.

Who's Abby? Basically, she's the first person you ever met when you reincarnated.

...

Extra images:

img1 img2 img3 img4 img5

It was actually very hard to make consistent images of this character, god.

The scenario was an idea from Dr.Chadickus.

The character was made by me.

She's autistic so you can go crazy with the persona, lol.

If you don't like the idea of being a character but still be yourself, you can always reincarnate WITH the character's personality. But you should know that already since you can write whatever you want in the chat memory bro.

Uuuuuh yeah I think that's all I had to say bye.

Oh I forgot, I didn't mentioned this last time but I actually improved 2 bots: This one and this one.

With that last one I basically redid the whole definition so it might be worth it if you take a look at it.
creator: Stays
